= Kádas Opening: Koola-Koola Variation =
This opening is a little-known but strong response to 1.h4. After 2. h5 a4 3. h6 a3 4. hxg7 Bxg7 Black puts pressure on White's queenside.{{chess position|rd|nd|bd|qd|kd|bd|nd|rd||pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|pd|||||||||pd|||||||||||||||pl|||||||||pl|pl|pl|pl|pl|pl|pl||rl|nl|bl|ql|kl|bl|nl|rl|=|title=Kádas Opening: Koola-Koola Variation|collapse=yes}}

=== White's responses ===
White has many decent replies.

* 2.h5 this move is a mistake
* 2.a4 a strong move that blocks the advance of the a-pawn. after 2...h5 an equal position arises
* 2.g3 An interesting move, preparing the bishop's exit to g2.

= Statistics =
No statistics as 1. h4 a5 is rarely played.
